hooks.command: for interpreter in python3 python py; do "$interpreter" -V >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec env PYTHONUTF8=1 "$interpreter" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/guard.py"; done; exit 127
for interpreter in python3 python py; do "$interpreter" -V >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec env PYTHONUTF8=1 "$interpreter" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/inject_protocol.py"; done; exit 127
for interpreter in python3 python py; do "$interpreter" -V >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec env PYTHONUTF8=1 "$interpreter" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/block_pii_prompt.py"; done; exit 127
